top.option: Congratulations! You’ve been selected to be one of the first few traders to test our newest platform feature -
top.name: «Selling options before expiry».

center.moment: of opening an option you are able to cancel it prior to the expiration time.
center.100: You get 100% of your investment back
center.coast: if the price did not change in those 3 seconds.
center.selll: you can sell the option back to us for a suggested price.

bottom.cta: With «Selling options before expiry» you lower the risks and protect your investments.
